description:
IAP Desktop is a Windows application that allows you to manage multiple Remote Desktop connections to Windows VM instances that run on Google Cloud. This is not an officially supported Google product.


Release 2.49 introduces several quality improvements, including the following:
- You can now create new profiles by using the Profile > New profile... menu item.
- When IAP Desktop can't connect to a Windows VM, the error message now includes more detailed information.
The release also contains fixes for the following issues:
- Sign-in: On some Windows machines, signing in to IAP Desktop failed with "access denied" or "connection refused" errors after applying the latest Windows updates. (#1696)
- Project Explorer: Loading the list of projects could fail when IAP Desktop wasn't able to determine the status of one or more VM instances. (433036592)
IAP Desktop is developed and maintained by jpassing.
